mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Notification (receiver_user_id, actor_user_id, type, title, message, post_id, comment_id, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{receiverUserId}, #{actorUserId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{postId}, #{commentId}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Notification WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE Notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Notification WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND is_read = 1
DELETE FROM Notification WHERE is_read = 1 AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
